refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what customer churn is and why it matters for businesses. It seems like we need to predict when customers might stop buying from us.
I should figure out what historical sales and interaction data we have. This might include things like how much customers bought and how often they interacted with us.
I need to know what performance metrics are used in machine learning, like accuracy, precision, and recall. I should learn how to calculate these metrics.
I need to understand what overfitting means and why it's a problem. It sounds like it means the model works well on training data but not on new data.
I should look into ways to improve the model if it is overfitting, like using cross-validation or simplifying the model.
I need to plan how to write the report. It should have numerical results and a summary. I might need to explain my findings clearly.
